hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|git push --force.*(main|master)|git push -f.*(main|master)|DROP TABLE|chmod -R 777 /)'; then echo "Blocked dangerous command" >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.|\.secret|\.pem$|\.key$|credentials)'; then echo "Blocked: editing sensitive file $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi
echo '=== Session Context ===' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} echo 'Branch: {}' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo '(not a git repo)'
